LanguageData.Ammo_BoltXonus_Standard.label: Xonus bolt shell (Standard)
LanguageData.Ammo_BoltXonus_Standard.description: A .998 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes heavy bolters.
LanguageData.Ammo_BoltXonus_Inferno.label: Xonus bolt shell (Inferno)
LanguageData.Ammo_BoltXonus_Inferno.description: A .998 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes heavy bolters.
LanguageData.Ammo_BoltXonus_MetalStorm.label: Xonus bolt shell (Metal Storm)
LanguageData.Ammo_BoltXonus_MetalStorm.description: A .998 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes heavy bolters.
LanguageData.Ammo_BoltXonus_Kraken.label: Xonus bolt shell (Kraken)
LanguageData.Ammo_BoltXonus_Kraken.description: A .998 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes heavy bolters.
LanguageData.Bullet_BoltXonus_Standard.label: .998 cal bolt (Standard)
LanguageData.Bullet_BoltXonus_Inferno.label: .998 cal bolt (Inferno)
LanguageData.Bullet_BoltXonus_MetalStorm.label: .998 cal bolt (Metal Storm)
LanguageData.Bullet_BoltXonus_Kraken.label: .998 cal bolt (Kraken)
